advisoryContext: Login from new device in foreign country minutes after password reset; velocity of high-value transfers to newly added payees.
Multiple e-commerce authorizations at digital goods merchants within ten minutes; shipping address differs from billing profile.
Inbound wires from unrelated individuals followed by immediate outbound crypto purchases; account age under thirty days.
Retail card used at money transfer MCC 4829 with amount just below reporting threshold; inconsistent with twelve-month spend pattern.
Monthly subscription at known streaming merchant; stable amount and same merchant for eighteen consecutive months.
Customer disputes legitimate charges after goods delivered; prior dispute history on same account within ninety days.
